title: Lightfield
abstract: Lightfield may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platforms.
abstract_zh: Lightfield？小众到可能连个bug都没有，但它对症下药，专注精准。在这个AI界瞬息万变的年代，专治疑难杂症的它比那些拖沓的通用平台强多了！毕竟，谁不想找个技术宅给你单独做CT扫描呢？
